rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JOSEFINA S. GUIUAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Under California Probate Code Sec 17200 Concerning The Internal Affairs Of The Trust: 1)Remiving The Trustee; 2)Passing Upon The Acts Of The Trustee; 3) Nullifying The Notification By Trustee Pursuant To Probate Code §16061.7
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/12/17. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 6 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.
